commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an ACP-core fallback regex for URL userinfo and a package-level regression test for password-bearing and token-only URL credentials.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +21. Total +22 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: import through `src/acp/runtime/errors.ts` installs the root logging redactor, ACP-core returns that configured redactor before fallback patterns, and the root redactor has no URL-userinfo pattern or prefilter. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the PR has a security-path blocker and the contributor must supply proof from the actual configured runtime path; this should not be marked ready by automation while proof is insufficient.
